title: Add AINewsForge to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [AINewsForge](Not public) to business
- AINewsForge is an agentic system built with LangGraph that fetches news, generates LinkedIn posts, verifies claims, creates cover images, reviews quality, and publishes to LinkedIn.

Fixes #11622

gist.headline: News, forged responsibly
gist.blurb: AINewsForge joined the business garden: an agentic newsroom that gathers stories, checks its work, makes a cover, and sends a polished post to LinkedIn. Apparently even content pipelines need editors.
gist.summary: Added AINewsForge to the business app directory, showcasing a LangGraph agentic workflow that fetches news, verifies claims, generates LinkedIn copy and cover images, reviews quality, and publishes posts.
gist.impact: Builders can discover a concrete Pollinations-powered example of a multi-step AI publishing system that takes news from research through reviewed LinkedIn publication.
gist.visual_concept: Depict a cozy miniature AI newsroom inside a garden shed: Polly acts as a tiny editor wearing a press hat, reviewing a news page beside a retro terminal. Code-plants grow around a corkboard of verified story notes, while a small CRT monitor robot holds a finished LinkedIn-style post and a pastel cover-image card.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny press hat, editing a news story in a warm garden-shed newsroom; a CRT monitor robot proudly holds a polished LinkedIn post and cover-image card beside code-plants and a board of checked notes. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes; small pixel-font text: 'FACT CHECKED'. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
